summary: Technical problem affecting access to disk storage systems.

summary: Workspaces scheduled for migration are unavailable during cutover window.

updates.details: Check the schedule to see dates for specific workspaces.

summary: Advance notice of next regular scheduled maintenance day

updates.details: Advance notice of scheduled maintenance day on Tues 14th April 2026. Please plan your work to minimise disruption.

Scheduled upgrade to tape library, for ~2 hours from 09:00 on Tuesday 24 March, during which no access to tape although ingest can continue (to cache). Requests for retrieval will be accepted but there will be a delay in mounting/reading tapes.
Many nodes drained this morning; jobs may have failed or be queued up. Cause under investigation.

summary: Volume full, no further writes possible

updates.details: Please clean up any old/unused data ASAP.

summary: JASMIN Cloud is being decommissioned on 14/04/26

updates.details: All tenants should have access to the new cloud. All machines on the old cloud will be switched off 14/04/26
